source.definition: an official document certifying the completion of a course or qualification

explanation.sourceText: The English word "diploma" comes from the French "diplôme", which in turn derives from the Latin "diploma" and the Greek "δίπλωμα" (diploma, meaning "something folded").
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „diploma” provine din franceză „diplôme”, care la rândul său provine din latină „diploma” și greaca veche „δίπλωμα” („ceva pliat”).

source.additional: "Diploma" is often associated with academic degrees and indicates that someone has successfully completed certain studies.

target.definition: un document oficial care atestă o absolvire sau o calificare

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "diplomă" was borrowed from the French "diplôme", which comes from the Latin "diploma" and the Greek "δίπλωμα".
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „diplomă” a fost împrumutat din franceză „diplôme”, provenit din latină „diploma” și greaca veche „δίπλωμα”.

target.additional: În România, diploma este adesea cerută ca dovadă a realizărilor academice.

examples.sourceText: He received his diploma in mechanical engineering.
examples.targetText: El a obținut diploma în inginerie mecanică.

examples.sourceText: The diploma is a building block for a career.
examples.targetText: Diploma este o piatră de temelie pentru carieră.

examples.sourceText: The university awards numerous diplomas every year.
The diploma opens many doors in professional life.
examples.targetText: Diploma deschide multe uși în viața profesională.

examples.sourceText: He graduated with honors on his diploma.
examples.targetText: El a absolvit diploma cu distincție.

examples.sourceText: To receive funding, you need a diploma.
examples.targetText: Pentru a obține o finanțare, ai nevoie de o diplomă.

learningTips.text: Remember that "diploma" sounds like "deploy-ma" — think of deploying your skills after graduation!
Associate "diplomă" with the English word "diploma" to easily recall it as your academic certificate.
Think of a diploma as your 'ticket' to professional success, just like a passport opens doors to new countries.
The word "diploma" comes from something folded — imagine your certificate folded neatly in a folder.
